approvalNote: Repair pass for two storybook auditions whose v2 generated clips failed on brand-name pronunciation or transcription. These are voice auditions, so the excerpt avoids the fragile brand word and keeps the poetic storybook tone.

george_storyteller.role: Warm British male storybook narrator for comic heroic rhymes

chris_playful.role: Playful grounded male voice for sport, comedy, and practical rhymes

takes.speaker: storybook_narrator
takes.text: In dawn's cold hush, when pipes began to cry, brave Gary raised his wrench against the sky. Poor Gary stared where once his triumph stood; the leak was fixed, but not the way he could. Then came one place, not smoke or flame, to keep each job by date and name.
takes.title: JobDone Gary Great Leak - George Storybook Repair

takes.speaker: storybook_narrator
takes.text: Barnaby dreamed of glory on the tide; his crew brought tape, a bucket, and their pride. The task was clear: cross water, ring the bell. The plan, however, did not age so well. Then came the show beside the dock, and gave the mayhem rhythm, rules, and clock.
takes.title: Jury Rigged Barnaby Boat - Chris Storybook Repair

takes.speaker: storybook_narrator
takes.text: Barnaby dreamed of glory on the tide; his crew brought tape, a bucket, and their pride. The task was plain: sail out and ring the bell. The plan, however, did not age so well. Then came the show beside the dock, and gave the mayhem rhythm, rules, and clock.
takes.title: Jury Rigged Barnaby Boat - Chris Storybook Repair 2
